DeepMind Control Suite\tablecite{tassa2018deepmind} & Robotics; Physical & Suite & arXiv 2018 & Reward & 14 domains & TI, AC & Continuous control & control return; sample efficiency; episode return\\

\endgroup
}
\vspace{0.25em}\parbox{\linewidth}{\scriptsize\textit{Legend.} Eval. Focus tags are non-exclusive: TI, temporal/imaginative; SS, structured-state consistency; AC, action-coupled utility/safety. Eval. Target denotes the output, state, behavior, or score directly evaluated; input and conditioning modalities are intentionally omitted. 3D/4D: static/dynamic 3D world; Bench.: benchmark; Env.: environment; Sim.: simulator; NR: not reported or not verifiable. Type distinguishes benchmarks, suites, simulators, environments, datasets, metrics, and protocols. Scale retains source-reported units; only principal official dimensions or metrics are shown.}
\end{table}
